_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Diagnosis made is backed by clinical manifestation

preauth.label: Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment

claim.label: Post treatment Blood investigation report (CBC, MP, Platelet etc.)

ppd_preauth.q: Did the patient have any of the symptoms like fever with or without chills or sweating, severe breathlessness, internal or external bleeding, convulsions followed by coma, decreased urine output, acute dyspnoea?

cpd_claim.q: Was patient treated with IV antimalarial, IV fluids, IV Dextrose, Steroids NSAIDS?

common_queries: MP test result not documented as positive.

Patient's clinical presentation lacking documented symptoms such as severe breathlessness, internal/external bleeding, convulsions, decreased urine output, acute dyspnoea (indicative of complicated malaria).
Treatment provided not including IV antimalarial, IV fluids, IV Dextrose, or Steroids/NSAIDS as required.
Peripheral smear/RMT test report not submitted at pre-authorization.
Blood report (CBC, MP, Platelet) not submitted at pre-authorization.
Detailed Indoor case paper not submitted at claim submission.
Post-treatment Blood investigation report (CBC, MP, Platelet etc.) not submitted at claim submission.
Detailed discharge summary not submitted at claim submission.

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed with Malaria only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical manifestation
